summary: P0 Trust Cues and Admin Status testing complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Admin Status page at /admin correctly displays INTERNAL badge, persisted MongoDB collections with counts, in-memory collections, seed strategy, and known limitations. Back button navigates to /mission-control. All trust cue toasts updated: LiveEvent shows 'Saved — [athlete] × [school]' with green Saved indicator, RecommendationBuilder shows 'Draft saved' and 'Sent to [school] — saved', RecommendationDetail shows 'Response saved', 'Follow-up saved', 'Closed — saved', EventSummary shows 'Routed to Support Pod — synced'. Core modes (Mission Control, Events, Advocacy, Program) all load correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test data created during pytest runs prefixed with TEST_
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Trust Cues and Admin Status fully tested. Admin page at /admin (hidden, not in nav) shows internal system status. Trust cues are toast messages using sonner library - 'Saved' for write operations, 'synced' for routing operations. LiveEvent has additional green 'Saved' indicator with data-testid='saved-indicator' that animates for 3 seconds after note capture. All core modes working: Mission Control, Events (Prep/Live/Summary), Advocacy (Builder/Detail), Program Intelligence.

admin_status: returns 8 persisted collections with counts (event_notes, recommendations, pod_actions, athlete_notes, assignments, messages, pod_resolutions, pod_action_events)
returns 4 in-memory collections with counts (athletes, events, schools, interventions)
trust_cue_endpoints: POST /api/events/{event_id}/notes returns note with id for Saved toast
POST /api/advocacy/recommendations/{id}/send returns school_name for 'Sent to [school] — saved' toast
POST /api/advocacy/recommendations/{id}/respond returns data for 'Response saved' toast
POST /api/advocacy/recommendations/{id}/follow-up returns data for 'Follow-up saved' toast
POST /api/advocacy/recommendations/{id}/close returns data for 'Closed — saved' toast
POST /api/events/{event_id}/notes/{note_id}/route returns routed:true for 'Routed to Support Pod — synced' toast
POST /api/events/{event_id}/route-to-pods returns counts for bulk route toast
core_modes: Mission Control API returns priority alerts and upcoming events
Events API returns upcoming and past events

admin_status_page: Persisted (MongoDB) collections section visible with collection items
In-Memory Only section visible with athletes, events, schools, interventions
live_event_trust_cues: Green 'Saved' indicator with check icon visible next to newly captured note
recommendation_builder_trust_cues: Send Recommendation shows 'Sent to [school] — saved' toast
event_summary_trust_cues: Single route shows 'Routed to Support Pod — synced' toast
Bulk route shows 'Routed X notes — synced to Y Support Pods' toast (verified via API test)

verified_features: GET /api/admin/status: Returns persistence_phase, persisted collections, in-memory collections, seed_strategy, limitations, architecture
Admin Status page (/admin): Displays INTERNAL badge, MongoDB collections with counts, in-memory collections, seed strategy, limitations
Admin page back button: Navigates to /mission-control
LiveEvent note capture: Toast shows 'Saved — [athlete] × [school]' instead of 'Logged'
LiveEvent Saved indicator: Green animated 'Saved' text with check icon appears for 3 seconds after capture
RecommendationBuilder Send: Toast shows 'Sent to [school] — saved'
RecommendationBuilder Save Draft: Toast shows 'Draft saved'
RecommendationDetail Send Draft: Toast shows 'Sent to [school] — saved'
RecommendationDetail Log Response: Toast shows 'Response saved'
EventSummary Single Route: Toast shows 'Routed to Support Pod — synced'
EventSummary Bulk Route: Toast shows 'Routed X notes — synced to Y Support Pods'
